Espresso-Based Coffee.Espresso: A strong, full-bodied coffee shot made from finely-ground coffee beans.
Espresso-Based Coffee.Americano: A smooth coffee drink made by diluting espresso with hot water.
Espresso-Based Coffee.Latte: Creamy and rich, made with espresso and steamed milk, topped with a thin layer of foam.
Espresso-Based Coffee.Cappuccino: A balanced blend of espresso, steamed milk, and thick milk foam.
Espresso-Based Coffee.Macchiato: A shot of espresso topped with a dollop of frothy steamed milk.
Espresso-Based Coffee.Flat White: A velvety coffee with a higher ratio of espresso to steamed milk, topped with a thin layer of microfoam.
Espresso-Based Coffee.Mocha: A chocolate-flavored coffee drink made with espresso, steamed milk, and chocolate syrup.
Espresso-Based Coffee.Cortado: A balanced coffee drink with equal parts espresso and steamed milk.

Cold Brew and Iced Coffee.Classic Cold Brew: Smooth and refreshing, steeped slowly in cold water for a full-bodied flavor.
Cold Brew and Iced Coffee.Iced Americano: A chilled version of the classic Americano, with espresso and cold water over ice.
Cold Brew and Iced Coffee.Iced Latte: Espresso combined with chilled milk and served over ice for a creamy, refreshing taste.
Cold Brew and Iced Coffee.Iced Cappuccino: A frothy iced coffee made with espresso, cold milk, and ice, topped with foam.
Cold Brew and Iced Coffee.Nitro Cold Brew: Cold brew infused with nitrogen for a creamy texture and rich, velvety taste.
Cold Brew and Iced Coffee.Iced Mocha: A chilled coffee drink made with espresso, milk, ice, and chocolate syrup.
Cold Brew and Iced Coffee.Iced Caramel Macchiato: Layers of espresso, vanilla-flavored milk, and ice, topped with caramel drizzle.
Cold Brew and Iced Coffee.Cold Brew Lemonade: A unique blend of cold brew coffee and lemonade, offering a refreshing twist.

Bottled Beverages.Orange Juice: Freshly squeezed, pure orange juice for a refreshing and vitamin-rich drink.
Bottled Beverages.Apple Juice: Crisp and sweet, made from fresh apples for a wholesome beverage.
Bottled Beverages.Lemonade: Classic lemonade made with real lemons, offering a perfect balance of sweet and tart flavors.
Bottled Beverages.Berry Blend Juice: A delicious mix of berries including strawberries, blueberries, and raspberries for a fruity treat.
Bottled Beverages.Tropical Punch: A vibrant blend of tropical fruits such as pineapple, mango, and passionfruit.
Bottled Beverages.Pomegranate Juice: Rich and tangy, made from 100% pomegranate for a healthy boost.
Bottled Beverages.Coconut Water: Naturally hydrating and refreshing, sourced from fresh coconuts.
Bottled Beverages.Green Juice: A nutritious blend of leafy greens, apples, and a hint of lemon for a healthy, revitalizing drink.

Bakery.Croissant: A flaky, buttery pastry perfect for pairing with coffee.
Bakery.Muffin: Moist and delicious, available in various flavors like blueberry, chocolate chip, and banana nut.
Bakery.Scone: A crumbly, slightly sweet pastry, often with fruit or chocolate chips.
Bakery.Danish: A sweet pastry with a variety of fillings such as cream cheese, fruit, or almond paste.
Bakery.Cinnamon Roll: Soft, sweet dough rolled with cinnamon and sugar, topped with icing.
Bakery.Bagel: Chewy and versatile, available plain or with toppings like sesame seeds, poppy seeds, and everything seasoning.
Bakery.Banana Bread: Moist and flavorful, made with ripe bananas and sometimes nuts or chocolate chips.
Bakery.Pain au Chocolat: A buttery pastry filled with rich chocolate, perfect for a sweet treat.

Snacks and Sweets.Chocolate Chip Cookie: Classic cookie filled with rich chocolate chips.
Snacks and Sweets.Brownie: Dense and fudgy, perfect for a chocolate lover's treat.
Snacks and Sweets.Granola Bar: A healthy and satisfying snack, often made with oats, nuts, and dried fruit.
Snacks and Sweets.Macaron: Delicate French cookies with a crisp shell and soft interior, available in various flavors.
Snacks and Sweets.Fruit Cup: A refreshing mix of seasonal fruits, perfect for a light snack.
Snacks and Sweets.Energy Bites: Bite-sized snacks made with ingredients like oats, peanut butter, and honey, providing a quick energy boost.
Snacks and Sweets.Yogurt Parfait: Layers of creamy yogurt, crunchy granola, and fresh fruit.
Snacks and Sweets.Rice Krispies Treat: A sweet, crispy snack made with puffed rice cereal and marshmallows
